brand.name: Misana
brand.longTagline: Eighty kilometres. One coast. One orchestrated week.

home.seoTitleTag: Private services on the French Riviera
home.metaDescription: Private chauffeur, helicopter transfers, yacht charter and luxury car rental on the French Riviera. Saint-Tropez to Monaco.
home.ogTitle: Private services on the French Riviera
home.ogDescription: Private chauffeur, helicopter transfers, yacht charter and luxury car rental on the French Riviera. Saint-Tropez to Monaco.
home.heroLead: Chauffeur, helicopter, cars, yacht and the right addresses. From Saint-Tropez to Menton, the coast held from end to end.
home.destinationsLead: From Saint-Tropez to Menton, eighty kilometres of coast we know by name. Eight cities, four heavy with our presence, four held lighter.
home.carsTitle: A fleet to choose, the keys handed in person.
home.yachtsTitle: A day at sea, or a week.
home.trust1Body: Saint-Tropez to Menton. We do not extend beyond. The coast is the brief, and we hold it from end to end.
home.trust2Body: No client name leaves the room. No press, no leak. The discretion that comes with returning year after year.
home.trust3Body: We answer every request within twenty-four hours. With a name, a phone, a route. Not a form.
home.finalTitle: A name, a date, a coast.
home.finalLead: Tell us the date, the route, the address. We answer within twenty-four hours.
home.searchNote: We hold the request consultative until you confirm. Nothing is reserved on send.
home.valueScopeBody: Saint-Tropez to Menton. We do not extend beyond. The coast is the brief, and we hold it from end to end.
home.valueReplyBody: Every request answered within twenty-four hours. With a name, a phone, a route. Not a form.
home.valueDiscretionBody: No client name leaves the room. No press, no leak, no logo. The trust that comes with returning year after year.
home.profilesTitle: A day, a weekend, a week.
home.profilesLead: We hold the route from end to end, whatever the duration. Pick the shape of the stay, we arrange the rest.
home.profileDayBody: Airport pickup, lunch on Pampelonne, dinner in Monaco, the helicopter back. One driver from start to end.
home.profileWeekendBody: Two nights, three lunches, the right table each evening. The yacht for one day, the chauffeur for the other.
home.profileWeekBody: Seven days from end to end of the coast. The flat, the boat, the tables, the helicopter on call. Pre-positioned, ready.
home.conciergeTitle: A named handler, not a form.
home.conciergeLead: Pick up the phone, send an email, send a request. The same person answers and stays with the file from start to end. We work in Riviera hours.
home.partnersTitle: Working with the addresses on the coast.
home.partnersBody: We hold relationships across the coast. If you run a palace, a restaurant, a beach club, a yacht, a villa, and want a quiet route to the right guests, write to us.
home.reachTitle: A name, a phone, a reply.
home.reachBody: Three ways to reach us. The same person on the other end. We answer within twenty-four hours, in Riviera hours.
home.newsletterLead: A note from us, every season. Addresses, routes, what is on the calendar. Nothing else.
home.newsletterThanks: Noted. The next letter will reach you in season.
home.heroIntroBody: Your week on the French Riviera, orchestrated end to end.
home.heroIntroSub: One house, one phone, one reply.

event.hero: {event} brings the coast to its busiest. We orchestrate the week from end to end. Chauffeurs in place by Tuesday. Tables held from Wednesday. Helicopter on call.
event.servicesSection: What we orchestrate during the event
event.servicesBody: We pre-position drivers, helicopters and tables for the week. The right vehicle, the right table, the right address. Booked early.

services.chauffeur: Drivers in place from Tuesday. Yacht-limo coverage on demand.
services.helicopter: Heliports held. Twenty-minute hops from the coast.
services.access: Tables, terraces, beaches kept for you. Without queue.
services.cars: Performance and supercar fleet, day and week.

event.whenBody: {event} takes place every {month} in {city}. We start taking requests three months before. The week itself is a single piece of orchestration. The earlier the request, the calmer the answer.
event.discretionBody: We work for guests, regulars, the right address. No client name leaves the room. No press, no leak, no logo. The trust that comes with returning year after year.

helicopter.hubTitle: Helicopter transfers on the French Riviera
helicopter.seoTitleTag: Helicopter transfer French Riviera · Nice Saint-Tropez Monaco Cannes
helicopter.hubLead: Four heliports held, twelve liaisons. Reply within thirty minutes, the same handler from end to end.
helicopter.hubDescription: Helicopter transfers on the French Riviera. Nice, Saint-Tropez, Monaco, Cannes-Mandelieu. From 7 to 22 minutes.
helicopter.ogTitle: Helicopter transfers on the French Riviera
helicopter.ogDescription: Nice, Saint-Tropez, Monaco, Cannes-Mandelieu. From 7 to 22 minutes.
helicopter.liaisonsLead: Flat fare per route between Nice, Monaco, Cannes-Mandelieu and Saint-Tropez-La Môle, taxes included.
helicopter.step1Body: The liaison you want. Date, time, aircraft if you have a preference.
helicopter.step2Body: Within thirty minutes, by one named contact. Helicopter route, pilot slot, departure and arrival helipad confirmed.
helicopter.step3Body: From the lounge to the cabin, no queue. Fifteen minutes later, you are elsewhere on the coast.

seo.title: The helicopter on the Riviera.
seo.p1: Misana operates helicopter transfers on the French Riviera. Four helipads: {nice} Côte d'Azur, {monaco}, {cannes}-Mandelieu, and Saint-Tropez-La Môle. Twelve inter-helipad routes available, from 7 to 22 minutes per flight.
seo.p2: Flat fare per helicopter route on the French Riviera, from €700 (Nice-Monaco) to €2,200 (Saint-Tropez-Monaco). No terminal wait. Direct boarding from the helipad.
seo.p3: Helicopter fleet: Airbus H125, H130, H135, H155, AS355 and Bell 429. Single-engine and twin-engine aircraft, 4 to 6 passengers per flight, larger aircraft on request. Luggage limited to soft cabin bags.
seo.p4: Helicopter transfers combine with other Misana services: {chauffeur2} for onward ground transport, {cars} for self-driven days, {yacht} to reach the sea, {access} for onshore bookings. Full request via the {request}.

chauffeur.hubTitle: Private chauffeur on the French Riviera
chauffeur.heroSeoH2: Airport transfers and full-day hire, from Saint-Tropez to Monaco
chauffeur.hubLead: Transfer or full disposal. Mercedes mostly, Range Rover when the road asks for it. Reply within thirty minutes, the same handler from end to end.
chauffeur.hubDescription: Private chauffeur on the French Riviera. Airport transfers Nice, Cannes, Monaco, Saint-Tropez. Mercedes, Range Rover, Maybach. Flat fares.
chauffeur.seoTitleTag: Private chauffeur French Riviera · Nice Monaco Cannes Saint-Tropez
chauffeur.ogTitle: Private chauffeur on the French Riviera
chauffeur.ogDescription: Airport transfers Nice, Cannes, Monaco, Saint-Tropez. Mercedes, Range Rover, Maybach. Flat fares.
chauffeur.heroAlt: Private chauffeur on the French Riviera · Mercedes, Saint-Tropez to Monaco
chauffeur.fleetVehicleNote: Available for transfer and full disposal.
chauffeur.transfersTitle: Flat rate per route, all included.
chauffeur.transfersLead: A fixed amount per route, all taxes included. Your driver meets you at the airport exit. Everything is confirmed at booking.
chauffeur.disposalTitle: A day, an evening, an event.
chauffeur.step1Body: The transfer or the day you want. Date, place, vehicle if you have a preference.
chauffeur.step2Body: Within thirty minutes, by one named handler. Price confirmed, driver assigned, contact shared.
chauffeur.step3Body: At the place, on the hour. The same handler stays reachable until your return.

seo.title: The driver on the Riviera.
seo.p1: Misana provides a private chauffeur service on the French Riviera, from {saintTropez} to {monaco}. Main routes: {nice} airport to Monaco (35 min), {cannes} (35 min), Saint-Tropez (1h45), {capFerrat} (25 min), and {capDAntibes} (30 min). All {transfersLink} are flat-fare.
seo.p2: Two service types: airport transfers (point-to-point, fixed price per route) and full-day hire (4h, 8h or more, with a dedicated driver). All services include taxes, standard waiting time, and meet-and-greet at the terminal.
seo.p3: Fleet: Mercedes E-Class, V-Class, S-Class, Range Rover Vogue, Maybach S 680, and Sprinter VIP. During the {festival}, the {grandPrix}, the {monacoYachtShow}, and the {saintTropezVoiles}, booking 4 to 8 weeks ahead is recommended.
seo.p4: The chauffeur service combines with other Misana services: {cars} for self-driven days, {yacht} for sea outings, {helicopter} for long distances, {access} for onshore bookings. Full request via the {request}.

yacht.hubTitle: Yacht charter on the French Riviera
yacht.hubLead: Yacht charter by the day or by the week. From 15 to over 50 metres, crew included.
yacht.hubDescription: Yacht charter on the French Riviera. By the day, weekend or week. From 15 to over 50 metres, crew included. Saint-Tropez, Cannes, Monaco.
yacht.seoTitleTag: Yacht charter French Riviera · Saint-Tropez Cannes Monaco
yacht.ogTitle: Yacht charter on the French Riviera
yacht.ogDescription: By the day, weekend or week. From 15 to over 50 metres, crew included. Saint-Tropez, Cannes, Monaco.
yacht.heroAlt: Yacht charter French Riviera · Saint-Tropez, Cannes, Antibes, Monaco
yacht.sizesLead: From a fifteen-metre day cruise to a fifty-metre mega yacht for the week. Four formats, each with its own purpose.

riviera-weekend.title: Riviera weekend
riviera-weekend.body: Saint-Tropez on Friday evening, Cannes for Saturday lunch, Monaco for Sunday brunch. The chauffeur waiting at every port. One night aboard, one night in suite.

pampelonne-family.title: Pampelonne with family
pampelonne-family.body: Twelve guests aboard, two tenders, lunch held at Club 55. Anchored from ten to seven. Lifeguard arranged on request, water toys ready.

sardaigne-week.title: Sardinia in a week
sardaigne-week.body: Saint-Tropez to Porto Cervo, weather watched. Two nights at anchor, four nights in port. Provisioning and tables arranged on land, helicopter on call for the Bonifacio crossing.

festival-cannes.title: Festival de Cannes
festival-cannes.body: Anchored facing the Croisette, tender shuttle coordinated with the screenings. Driver on call, a table held every evening. The yacht as base, the festival as plan.

yacht.relatedSection: Other yachts in the same range
yacht.priceFootnote: Indicative charter rates plus VAT and APA. Crew, fuel and provisioning charged separately. Confirmed at booking.
yacht.allDescription: Full catalogue of yachts available for charter on the French Riviera. Filter by size, type, builder, port, amenities. Motor, sailing, catamaran from Cannes, Monaco and Saint-Tropez.

cond.apaBody: Advance Provisioning Allowance, around thirty percent of the charter rate. Covers fuel, dockage, food, beverages and other running costs. Reconciled at the end of the charter.
cond.vatBody: Mediterranean VAT applies according to the cruising itinerary. Confirmed at booking.
cond.fuelBody: Charged on actual usage from the APA. The route is planned to keep the consumption proportionate to the trip.
cond.crewBody: Captain and crew included in the charter rate. Service charge customary at the end of the charter.

included.boat: The yacht, fully maintained, ready at the chosen port
included.concierge: Misana concierge during the charter, twenty-four hours

seo.title: Practical information.
seo.p1: Misana provides yacht charter on the French Riviera, from {saintTropez} to {monaco}. 30 nautical miles between the two ports. Departures from Saint-Tropez, {cannes}, Antibes, or Port Hercule in Monaco. Anchorages at Pampelonne, {capFerrat}, Villefranche bay.
seo.p2: Three formats: day-cruise (12 to 18 metres, 10am-6pm), weekend (30 to 40 metres, 2 to 3 nights, crew and chef included), full-week charter (50 metres and above, Saturday to Saturday, full crew). 75 yachts available in the fleet.
seo.p3: Main season April through October. During the {festival}, the Cannes bay serves as a floating base. During the {grandPrix}, spectator anchorages open. The {cannesYachting} and the {monacoYachtShow}, in September, require 6 months of lead time.
seo.p4: Yacht charter combines with other Misana services: {chauffeur} for port arrivals, {cars} for days ashore, {helicopter} for long routes, {access} for evening bookings. Full request via the {request}.

access.hubTitle: Restaurant and beach club reservations on the French Riviera
access.seoTitleTag: Beach club, night club and hotel bookings · French Riviera
access.hubLead: Tables, suites and beaches booked in Saint-Tropez, Cannes and Monaco.
access.hubDescription: Beach club, night club, hotel and restaurant bookings on the French Riviera. Club 55, Bagatelle, Jimmy'z, Hôtel du Cap-Eden-Roc, Le Louis XV.
access.ogTitle: Beach club, night club and hotel bookings on the French Riviera
access.ogDescription: Club 55, Bagatelle, Jimmy'z, Hôtel du Cap-Eden-Roc, Le Louis XV. Bookings on the French Riviera.

body.restaurant: Direct booking on the French Riviera. Dietary requirements, allergies and special occasions communicated to the venue before arrival.
body.palace: Direct booking on the French Riviera. Dietary requirements, allergies and special occasions communicated to the venue before arrival.
body.beach-club: Direct booking on the French Riviera. Dietary requirements, allergies and special occasions communicated to the venue before arrival.
body.nightclub: Direct booking on the French Riviera. Dietary requirements, allergies and special occasions communicated to the venue before arrival.

how.restaurant: We hold direct relationships with maitres d hotel and house managers. The reservation is made by us, the requests are passed in advance, the special occasion is set up before you arrive. We can also arrange the chauffeur from your hotel or villa to the table and back.
how.palace: We work with the palace concierge teams across the coast. We secure the suite that fits the season and the occasion. Early check-in, late check-out, the floor that matters, the view that matters. The transfer from airport or heliport included if requested.
how.beach-club: We secure beach loungers and tables at lunch on the most considered beaches of the coast. The reservation is held, the welcome is by name, the rose is on ice when you arrive. Departure can be arranged by chauffeur or yacht-tender.
how.nightclub: We secure tables and entry at the right address of the night. The bottles arranged, the door opened, the discretion preserved. We can also arrange the chauffeur back to the hotel or villa at any hour.

access.discretionBody: We work for guests, regulars, the right address. No client name leaves the room. No press, no leak, no logo. The trust that comes with returning year after year.

seo.title: Access on the Riviera.
seo.p1: Misana operates a booking service on the French Riviera, from {saintTropez} to {monaco}. Michelin-starred restaurants, beach clubs, palace hotels, and night clubs in Monaco, {cannes}, {capDAntibes}, {capFerrat}, {nice}, and Saint-Tropez.
seo.p2: Restaurants: Le Louis XV (Monaco), La Vague d'Or (Saint-Tropez), Mirazur (Menton), La Palme d'Or (Cannes), Le Chantecler (Nice). Beach clubs: Club 55, Bagatelle (Saint-Tropez), Plage Beau Rivage (Nice). Palace hotels: Hôtel du Cap-Eden-Roc, Carlton, Martinez, Grand-Hôtel du Cap-Ferrat, Hôtel de Paris Monte-Carlo. Nightlife: Jimmy'z (Monaco), Bâoli (Cannes).
seo.p3: During the {festival} and the {grandPrix}, book 6 months ahead. During the {monacoYachtShow}, Monaco is partially saturated. Dietary requirements, allergies, and special occasions are communicated to the venue before arrival.
seo.p4: Access combines with other Misana services: {chauffeur} to connect hotel and venue, {cars} for free movement, {yacht} for lunch at sea, {helicopter} for long routes. Full request via the {request}.

how.1: Request sent directly to the maître d'hôtel or reception.
how.2: Dietary requirements, allergies, table preferences communicated in advance.
how.3: Confirmation by email, WhatsApp or phone.
how.4: Booking held in your name with the venue.

fiche.reservationFootnote: Same-day requests handled when timing allows. We reply within 30 minutes in Riviera hours.

chauffeur.title: Chauffeur on the coast
chauffeur.lead: A driver, a sedan, a route held from end to end. Eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton.
chauffeur.description: Private chauffeur service French Riviera. Mercedes V-Class, S-Class, E-Class, Range Rover Vogue, Maybach. Welcome at the gate, luggage assistance, English-speaking drivers.
chauffeur.howBody: We pre-position drivers across the coast. Mercedes mostly, Range Rover when terrain or weather asks for it. Flight tracking, luggage assistance, English-speaking. The route adjusted by traffic at that moment, not the GPS by default.
chauffeur.formTitle: Tell us the date and the route

helicopter.description: Private helicopter charter Riviera. Airbus H125, H130, AS355, H135, Bell 429, H155. Mercedes V-Class chauffeur included at both ends.
helicopter.howBody: Six heliports across the coast: Nice, Monaco, Cannes Mandelieu, Cannes Quai du Large, Saint-Tropez La Mole, Saint-Tropez Grimaud. Single and twin engine aircraft. Mercedes V-Class waiting on departure and arrival.
helicopter.formTitle: Tell us the route and the date

yacht.howBody: We work with a select network of yacht owners and brokers across the Riviera. Day cruise from fifteen-metre boats to mega-yacht charter for the week. Crew arranged, restaurants arranged on land, transfers arranged port-to-villa.

destinations.hubTitle: Eight destinations on the French Riviera
destinations.hubLead: From Saint-Tropez to Menton, eighty kilometres of coast we know by name. Four cities held heavy by our presence, four held lighter.
destinations.hubDescription: Misana destinations French Riviera : Saint-Tropez, Cannes, Nice, Monaco, Cap-Ferrat, Cap-d'Antibes, Eze, Menton. Concierge service from end to end of the coast.
destinations.servicesBody: We orchestrate transport, helicopter, cars, yacht and access in {city}. Eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton, all on the coast.

seo.title: Eight cities, an eighty-kilometre ribbon.
seo.p1: The French Riviera reads as one curved line: {saintTropez} to the west, {menton} to the east, and between them six cities that everything separates and everything binds. {cannes} for industry and the festival. {monaco} for finance, sport, statehood. {nice} as the prefecture and the only international airport within an hour. {capFerrat}, {eze} and {capDAntibes} as residential peninsulas, half-way along.
seo.p2: We hold four cities more firmly than the others because that is where our guests spend the most time: Cannes, Monaco, Nice and Saint-Tropez. Dense address book, installed partners, teams used to the rhythm. The other four, {capDAntibes}, {capFerrat}, {eze} and Menton, are held more lightly, through narrower threads: one palace, one table, one trail, one view.
seo.p3: How the cities link shapes the stay. The car for everyday legs, with a {chauffeur} or self-driven through a {cars}. The {helicopter} to cross Saint-Tropez to Monaco quickly. The {yacht} to reach Pampelonne and the coves. Airport {transfers} for the first and last mile. The detail by city sits in each dedicated page.
seo.p4: Across the year, the calendar redraws the coast. The {festival} and the {grandPrix} windows clog, free up and redirect the flows. The full {events} calendar holds the dates. For the right addresses during those windows, {access} concentrates the book. To set a stay around a specific date, the {request} is the shortest route.

events.hubLead: From the Festival de Cannes to the Monaco Yacht Show, the calendar that fills the coast. We orchestrate the stay around the date.
events.hubDescription: Misana events French Riviera : Festival de Cannes, Monaco Grand Prix, Cannes Lions, Monaco Yacht Show, MIPIM, MIPCOM, Cannes Yachting Festival, Saint-Tropez Voiles. Concierge for every date.

cars.hubTitle: Luxury car rental on the French Riviera
cars.hubLead: Luxury car rental on the French Riviera. Supercars, GTs and SUVs delivered where you are.
cars.hubDescription: Luxury car rental on the French Riviera. Supercars, GTs, SUVs and convertibles. Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Rolls-Royce. Delivered to airport, hotel or villa.

cars.ogDescription: Supercars, GTs, SUVs and convertibles. Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Rolls-Royce. Delivered to airport, hotel or villa.
cars.heroAlt: Luxury car rental French Riviera · Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Rolls Royce
cars.brandsLead: A handful of makers chosen for the coast. Italians for character, Germans for the road, British for quietness.
cars.brandsCarsLabel: car in the fleet | cars in the fleet

included.concierge: Misana concierge during the rental, twenty-four hours

cars.allDescription: Full catalogue of cars available for rent on the French Riviera. Filter by category, brand, year, transmission, fuel, seats, city of delivery.

seo.title: The car on the Riviera.
seo.p1: Misana provides luxury car rental on the French Riviera, from {saintTropez} to {monaco}. Delivery at {nice} airport, {cannes} hotels, {capFerrat} villas, {monteCarlo}, or any address you provide.
seo.p2: 37 cars available: Ferrari, Lamborghini, Bentley, Porsche, Mercedes, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin. Categories: supercars, GTs, SUVs, convertibles, sedans. Convertibles recommended April through October. Sedans and SUVs year-round. Comprehensive insurance included.
seo.p3: During the {festival}, the {grandPrix}, the {cannesYachting}, and the {monacoYachtShow}, book 6 months ahead for the most requested models.
seo.p4: Luxury car rental combines with other Misana services: {chauffeur} for days without driving, {yacht} for the sea, {helicopter} for long routes, {access} for tables and hotels. Full request via the {request}.

helicopterHub.title: Helicopter charter on the Riviera
helicopterHub.description: Private helicopter charter Riviera. Six aircraft : Airbus H125, H130, AS355, H135, Bell 429, H155. Twelve routes between Nice, Monaco, Cannes Mandelieu, Saint-Tropez La Mole.
helicopterHub.lead: Six aircraft, four hub cities, twelve routes. From the seven minutes Nice-Monaco to the twenty-two minutes Saint-Tropez-Monaco. Mercedes V-Class chauffeur included on departure and arrival.
helicopterHub.matrixLead: Twelve point-to-point routes between the hub cities of the coast. Indicative one-way price, Mercedes V-Class chauffeur included at both ends.
helicopterHub.matrixFootnote: Indicative rates from the lightest single-engine aircraft. Twin-engine and Bell 429 / H155 on request. All prices include Mercedes V-Class chauffeur on departure and arrival, taxes, fuel.
helicopterHub.formTitle: Tell us the route and the date

reassure.responseBody: Within 24 hours, by phone or email.

cgv.intro: Terms and conditions of sale applicable to the misana-group.com website.

sections.title: Article 1 — Purpose
sections.body:
These Terms and Conditions of Sale ("T&Cs") govern the contractual relationship between :

ANTOURA HOLDINGS LTD, a private limited company incorporated in England and Wales under company number 16434396, with registered office at 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom, operating under the commercial brand "Misana" ("Misana" or "the Provider"),

and any natural or legal person ("the Client") wishing to benefit from the services offered on misana-group.com.

Any request addressed to the Provider entails full acceptance of these T&Cs.

sections.title: Article 2 — Services
sections.body: Misana provides private services on the French Riviera. The detail of each service is specified in the quotation.

sections.title: Article 3 — Quotation and contract formation
sections.body:
Any service is subject to a prior request from the Client.

Misana confirms availability and issues a personalised quotation. The contract is formed upon express acceptance of the quotation by the Client. The particular conditions of the quotation prevail over these T&Cs.

sections.title: Article 4 — Pricing
sections.body:
Prices are stated in the quotation. VAT applicable to the place of performance applies in accordance with regulations in force.

Any modification of the service at the Client's request may result in a price adjustment.

sections.title: Article 5 — Payment terms
sections.body:
Payment terms (deposit, balance, deadlines, methods) are specified in the quotation and accepted by the Client upon confirmation.

Late payment penalties apply in accordance with applicable legal provisions, without prejudice to any other remedy of the Provider.

sections.title: Article 6 — Cancellation by the Client
sections.body:
Cancellation conditions and any refunds are specified in the quotation and accepted by the Client upon confirmation.

No refund is due in case of late cancellation by the Client, under the conditions defined in the quotation.

sections.title: Article 7 — Cancellation by the Provider and force majeure
sections.body:
Misana reserves the right to cancel or modify a service in the event of force majeure, conditions preventing safe execution, or any other circumstance affecting proper performance.

In such cases, Misana shall propose a replacement solution or a partial or full refund as defined in the quotation, excluding any further indemnity.

sections.title: Article 8 — Right of withdrawal
sections.body: In accordance with Article 16(l) of Directive 2011/83/EU, accommodation, transport, car rental, catering and leisure services provided on a specific date or for a specific period do not qualify for the right of withdrawal applicable to distance contracts.

sections.title: Article 9 — Client obligations
sections.body:
The Client undertakes to provide accurate information, respect agreed schedules, respect the assets and venues made available, and hold required documentation.

Any damage caused by the Client, his/her guests or any person under his/her responsibility shall be invoiced according to the conditions communicated in the quotation.

The Client is required to subscribe to any additional insurance he/she may deem useful.

sections.title: Article 10 — Liability
sections.body:
Misana undertakes to perform its obligations with diligence and according to industry standards.

Misana cannot be held liable for :
- indirect or non-material damages
- delays, cancellations or modifications due to force majeure
- non-performance due to the Client or his/her guests

Save for gross or wilful misconduct, the maximum indemnity due by Misana in the event of contractual breach is limited to the total amount actually paid by the Client for the relevant service, excluding any other category of damage.

sections.title: Article 11 — Personal data
sections.body: Data collected are processed in accordance with the Privacy policy.

sections.title: Article 12 — Complaints and mediation
sections.body:
Any complaint must be sent by email to contact (at) misana-group.com within a reasonable period from the end of the service.

Consumer Clients residing in the EU may use the ODR platform : https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr

sections.title: Article 13 — Applicable law and jurisdiction
sections.body:
These T&Cs are governed by English law, subject to mandatory consumer protection rules of the consumer Client's country of residence, in accordance with Rome I Regulation.

For consumer Clients residing in the EU, in accordance with Article 18 of Brussels I bis Regulation, the Client may refer the matter to the courts of his/her place of residence.

For non-consumer Clients, any dispute shall fall within the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

sections.title: Article 14 — Modification of T&Cs
sections.body: Antoura Holdings Ltd reserves the right to modify these T&Cs at any time. The applicable T&Cs are those in force on the day of acceptance of the quotation.

privacy.intro: Privacy policy applicable to the misana-group.com website.

sections.title: Data controller
sections.body:
ANTOURA HOLDINGS LTD is the data controller for personal data collected via the Site.

Contact : 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom
Email : contact (at) misana-group.com

Antoura Holdings Ltd complies with the UK GDPR and the EU GDPR (Regulation (EU) 2016/679) for EU residents' data.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.body:
Depending on interactions with the Site, the following data may be collected :
- Identification data : first name, last name, email
- Request data : dates, locations, preferences
- Browsing data : IP address, pages visited
- Payment data : processed securely and never stored by Antoura Holdings Ltd

sections.title: Purposes
sections.body: Data are processed to respond to requests, execute services, send commercial communications with consent, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: Legal basis
sections.body: Depending on the processing : contract performance, consent, legitimate interest or legal obligation.

sections.title: Retention period
sections.body: Data are retained for the duration necessary for the purpose of the processing and in accordance with applicable legal obligations.

sections.title: Processors and transfers
sections.body: Data may be processed by processors located in the European Union or in countries with an adequacy decision or covered by standard contractual clauses, in accordance with the GDPR.

sections.title: Data subjects' rights
sections.body:
In accordance with the GDPR and UK GDPR, you have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection.

To exercise these rights : contact (at) misana-group.com

You may also lodge a complaint with :
- In France : the CNIL (https://www.cnil.fr)
- In the UK : the ICO (https://ico.org.uk)
- In any other EU Member State : your national supervisory authority

sections.title: Security
sections.body: Antoura Holdings Ltd implements appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data.

sections.title: Modifications
sections.body: This policy may be modified at any time. The version in force is the one published on the Site.

cookies.intro: Cookie policy applicable to the misana-group.com website.

sections.title: Responsible
sections.body:
The Site misana-group.com uses cookies. The data controller is Antoura Holdings Ltd.

Email : contact (at) misana-group.com

sections.title: Definition
sections.body: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device when visiting the Site. It stores information related to browsing.

sections.title: Cookie categories used
sections.body:
Essential cookies (no consent required)
Necessary for the functioning of the Site. They cannot be disabled.

Analytics cookies (consent required)
Used to measure Site audience and improve its operation.

Marketing cookies (consent required)
Used to personalise communications.

sections.title: Retention period
sections.body: Cookies are retained in accordance with applicable legal durations, not exceeding thirteen months.

sections.title: Consent management
sections.body: On your first visit, a consent banner allows you to accept, refuse or customise the use of non-essential cookies.

sections.title: Rights
sections.body:
In accordance with the GDPR and UK GDPR, you have rights of access, rectification, erasure and objection regarding data processed via cookies.

For any request : contact (at) misana-group.com

sections.title: Modifications
sections.body: This policy may be modified at any time. The version in force is the one published on the Site.

transfer.hubTitle: Private transfers on the French Riviera
transfer.hubLead: Twenty popular routes, fixed indicative fares. Mercedes, Range Rover, Maybach. Welcome at the gate, luggage assistance, English-speaking drivers.
transfer.hubDescription: Private chauffeur transfers French Riviera. Nice airport to Cannes, Monaco, Saint-Tropez, Cap-Ferrat. Mercedes V-Class, S-Class, Range Rover Vogue.
transfer.hero: A driver, a sedan, the right name on the sign. Eighty kilometres between Saint-Tropez and Menton. We hold the route from end to end.
transfer.howBody: We track flight times. The driver is at the gate. Bags are handled. The route is decided by traffic at that moment, not the GPS by default. The arrival is on time, in calm.
transfer.fleetBody: Mercedes mostly. Range Rover Vogue when terrain or weather asks for it. All vehicles maintained, glass tinted, water, phone chargers, the small things that matter.

included.welcome: Welcome at the gate, name on the sign
included.flightTracking: Flight tracking, no penalty for delays

faq.q1: What if my flight is delayed?
faq.a1: We track every commercial and private flight in real time. The driver waits up to sixty minutes after landing for commercial flights, thirty minutes for private aviation, with no surcharge.
faq.q2: Can I add a stop on the way?
faq.a2: Yes. We do this often, especially for restaurant arrivals, baggage drops at the hotel, or a private call by the road. Mention it in the request.
faq.a3: Yes. Infant seats (zero to two years), child seats (two to four), boosters (four to ten) are complimentary. Mention the count and ages in the request.
